metadata.description: Stride task management skills for AI agents

plugins.name: stride
plugins.description: Task lifecycle skills for Stride kanban: claiming, completing, creating tasks and goals, enriching tasks, workflow orchestration, subagent dispatch, and automatic hook execution via Claude Code hooks

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: AI-powered security review via /security-review. Two scan modes: diff (default, PR-gating) and --full (codebase posture check, batched with cross-batch dedup and skipped-files reporting). Detects 10 universal vulnerability classes plus 5 MAESTRO-derived agentic-AI classes (prompt injection, tool abuse, agent trust boundary, model output execution, vector-store poisoning). Three framework rule packs ship at launch (Django/Python, Phoenix/Elixir, Rails/Ruby) plus a multi-platform CI/CD pipeline pack (8 platforms). Every finding carries CWE-ID and OWASP Top 10 references. Opt-in flags: --maestro (7-layer threat classification), --rci [N] (recursive criticism passes), --baseline (suppress acknowledged findings), --patches (surgical-fix unified diffs). Semantic analysis, not pattern matching. Loosely based on anthropics/claude-code-security-review.
